name: latency_slo
description: Demonstrates max_total_seconds - the wall-clock budget every agent populates. The bound is loose to keep the demo robust; tighten it to enforce a real SLO. For per-stream-event budgets (ttfe/ttft/ttlt), see latency_streaming_dry_run.json.

turns.message: Reply with the single word 'pong' on its own line. Nothing else.
